scripts.demo:install: npm --prefix examples/next-demo install && npm --prefix tools/preview-wallet install
scripts.demo:dev: concurrently -k -n wallet,app -c green,blue "npm --prefix tools/preview-wallet start" "npm --prefix examples/next-demo run dev"
scripts.demo:check: npm run wallet:check && npm --prefix examples/next-demo run check
scripts.wallet:check: npm --prefix tools/preview-wallet run check && npm --prefix tools/preview-wallet run test && node scripts/check-preview-wallet-sync.mjs
